ecm.description: The equivalent-circuit model: RC-pair count, grid axes, and the table sidecar.

limits.description: Operating limits (power vs SoC, cell voltage bounds, C-rate).

model.description: The equivalent-circuit family (currently only RC-pair Thevenin).

soc_window.description: Usable state-of-charge window `[min, max]`, ascending within `[0, 1]`.

thermal.description: Lumped thermal node (mass·cp, jacket resistance, coolant temperature).

oneOf.description: Thevenin equivalent circuit with one or more series RC pairs.

BatteryTables.description: The parameter-table sidecar reference plus the level its values are stated at.

file.description:
Reference to the long/tidy parquet sidecar
(`soc, temp_c, ocv_v, r0_ohm, r1_ohm, tau1_s, dudt_v_per_k`).

level.description: Whether the OCV/resistance values are stated per cell or per pack.

Ecm.description: The equivalent-circuit model: RC-pair count, table axes, and the sidecar reference.

axes.description: The `(soc, temp_c)` grid axes the sidecar tables are sampled on.

rc_pairs.description: Number of series RC pairs (currently 1 — the tables carry `r1`/`tau1`).

tables.description: The parameter-table sidecar reference and its level (cell vs pack).

EcmAxes.description: The ECM grid axes (both strictly ascending).

MapRef.description: Reference to a numeric sidecar map table (parquet/CSV), e.g. an aero or K&C map.

PackCapacity.description: Pack capacity, as reported by the source pack.

q_pack_ah.description: Pack charge capacity, A·h (Coulomb counting divides by this).

PackLimits.description: Operating limits: peak power vs SoC, cell-voltage bounds, and the maximum C-rate.

max_c_rate.description: Maximum continuous C-rate (informational; power limits bind first).

peak_discharge_power_w_vs_soc.description: Peak discharge power vs SoC, W (a positive-power ceiling).

peak_regen_power_w_vs_soc.description: Peak regen (charge) power vs SoC, W (a positive-magnitude ceiling on charging).

PackThermal.description: The lumped-node thermal parameters of the pack.

mass_kg.description: Pack thermal mass, kg (heat capacity `C = mass · cp`).

thermal_resistance_k_per_w.description: Jacket thermal resistance to the coolant, K/W (heat leaves as `(T − T_coolant) / R`).

PackTopology.description: Series/parallel pack topology (`ns` cells in series × `np` strings in parallel).

np.description: Number of parallel strings (splits the pack current `I_cell = I_pack / np`).

ns.description: Number of cells in series (sets the pack voltage `V_pack = ns · V_cell`).

PowerVsSoc.description: A power-vs-SoC curve: paired equal-length SoC / power arrays.

SchemaVersion.description: Schema version of the form <name>/<MAJOR>.<MINOR>, e.g. vehicle/1.0

TableLevel.description: The level a parameter table's values are stated at.

oneOf.description: Values are per cell; the pack scales them by `ns`/`np` (voltage ×ns, resistance ×ns/np).
Values are already stated at the pack level (no `ns`/`np` scaling applied).
